title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF BADAJOZ, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON, TO SAN AGUSTIN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4519 / 53 OG No. 15, 4780 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1660, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF BADAJOZ, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON, TO SAN AGUSTIN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Badajoz, Province of Romblon, is changed to San Agustin.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
